_format: episode → phase → task → system → {encoded, maintained, retrieved, answered, note?}. Any missing booleans fall back to the algorithmic result.
_source: Hand-judged from retrieved_context + probe-time snapshots + paper §4.3 (Figure 4 + per-system failure mode write-up).

bm25.note: paper §4.3: BM25 — change event is below the top-k cutoff

dense.note: paper §4.3: text-embedding-3-small — change event in retrieved context, answering LLM still reports pre-change value

graphiti.note: paper §4.3 / Figure 4: Graphiti — graph search surfaces rule + pre-change value; change-event edge falls below top-k

karpathy.note: paper §4.3 / Figure 4: Karpathy Wiki — agent navigates to rule + pre-change source, never opens the daily log holding the change event

md_file.note: paper §4.3: MD-flat — change event never opened by the tool-use loop

mem0.note: paper §4.3: Mem0 — change event in retrieved context, answering LLM still reports pre-change value

md_file_opus.note: paper §4.3 / Figure 4: MD-flat × Opus 4.7 — Opus propagates the cascade rule into the store at ingest; retriever surfaces the propagated value directly
